properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God I look to You, I wont be overwhelmed Give me vision to see things like You do God I look to You, You're where my help comes from Give me wisdom, You know just what to do

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God I look to You, and I wont be overwhelmed Give me vision to see things like You do God I look to You, and You're where my help comes from Give me wisdom, You know just what to do Yeah yeah

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I will love You Lord my strength And I will love You Lord my shield And I will love You Lord my rock Forever all my days I will love You God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah our God reigns Hallelujah our God reigns Oh hallelujah our God you reigns Forever all my days Hallelujah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah our God reigns And hallelujah our God reigns Oh hallelujah our God you reigns Forever all my days Hallelujah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And hallelujah our God reigns Hallelujah our God reigns And Hallelujah our God reigns Forever all my days Hallelujah

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hallelujah our God reigns Hallelujah our God reigns Hallelujah our God you reigns Forever all my days Hallelujah

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And hallelujah our God reigns Hallelujah our God reigns Hallelujah our God reigns Forever all my days Hallelujah

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And hallelujah our God reigns And hallelujah our God reigns Yes hallelujah our God reigns Forever all my days Hallelujah
